product_overview: Lakoku is a story-creation app that lets readers start a new story from quick prompts, free-form ideas, or a full story-planning mode. It also includes a personal taste profile that can guide future story setup choices.
core_goals: Start a new story quickly from guided prompts
Write a custom story idea and turn it into story premises
Use a full planning flow to shape a story in more detail
Save and reuse a reader taste profile to personalize story setup
Resume a saved onboarding draft after logging in

features.name: Story Onboarding Flow
features.description: Lets users begin a new story from the /mulai entry point using quick prompts, custom ideas, or a full story-planning mode.
user_flows: Navigate to /mulai -> Choose quick start -> Answer the guided story questions -> Review three premise proposals -> Select a premise -> Start the story
Navigate to /mulai -> Choose to write a custom idea -> Enter a free-form story idea -> Submit the idea -> Review three premise proposals -> Select a premise -> Start the story
Navigate to /mulai -> Choose the full mode -> Move to /brainstorm -> Work through the detailed story-planning stages -> Continue the story setup process
Navigate to /mulai -> Choose quick start -> Answer one prompt with a custom response -> Continue through the remaining prompts -> Review three premise proposals -> Select a premise -> Start the story

features.name: Custom Answer Entry in Quick Start
features.description: Lets users replace any guided quick-start answer with their own text instead of using the default suggestion.
user_flows: Navigate to /mulai -> Start quick onboarding -> Open a guided question -> Choose to write a custom answer -> Enter the answer in your own words -> Save that answer -> Continue to the next question -> Review three premise proposals -> Select a premise

Navigate to /mulai -> Start quick onboarding -> Open a guided question -> Choose the default suggested answer -> Continue to the next question -> Review three premise proposals -> Select a premise -> Start the story

features.name: Reader Taste Profile
features.description: Lets users save story preferences such as genres, tropes, intensity, language style, and boundaries so future story setup can be personalized.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding/selera -> Answer the taste profile questions -> Save the profile -> Return to the app with preferences stored
Navigate to /onboarding/selera -> Answer some taste profile questions -> Choose to skip for now -> Leave the flow with no saved profile
Navigate to /onboarding/selera -> Complete the profile on one device -> Sign in on another device -> Choose to use the device's saved profile when prompted -> Continue with the stored preferences

features.name: Guest Draft Resume After Login
features.description: Lets guest users continue a saved story onboarding draft after signing in.
user_flows: Navigate to /mulai?resume=1 -> Continue a saved guest draft -> Go to the login screen -> Sign in with email and password -> Return to the saved story setup and continue the pipeline

features.name: Home and Library Shell
features.description: Provides a home area where users can access the main app shell, including the library and explore area.
user_flows: Navigate to /beranda -> View the home shell -> Browse the library area -> Explore available content
Navigate to / -> View the landing page -> Choose to begin creating a story -> Continue to /mulai
Navigate to / -> View the landing page -> Choose to open the home area -> Continue to /beranda

routes.description: Landing page with hero branding and CTA to /mulai or /beranda
Story onboarding entry screen with quick/custom/lengkap modes
Home shell with library and explore section

features.name: Story Onboarding Flow
features.description: Three entry modes for creating new stories
user_interactions: Click Mulai cepat button to start 4-question quiz
Click Aku punya ide sendiri to see custom idea textarea
Click Mode lengkap to navigate to /brainstorm
Tap quiz option buttons to answer each question
Tap Pilihkan untukku to use AI-default answer
Tap Tulis sendiri to reveal custom answer textarea with submit button
Type custom answer and click Pakai jawaban ini
Review 3 AI-generated premise proposals with trope badges and synopsis
Tap proposal card to select it and see summary
Click Masuk ke Cerita Ini to start pipeline
Guest redirected to /auth/login with draft saved to localStorage

features.name: Guest Resume Flow
features.description: Guest draft saved to localStorage, resumed after login
user_interactions: Create story as guest until lock stage
Redirected to login with Simpan ceritamu heading
Auto-resume draft and continue lock start pipeline
